title: Sentiment Analysis
content:
# Sentiment Analysis

## 1. Naive Bayes Classification
Select tag $c$ maximizing:

$$c_{NB} = \arg\max_{c \in \mathcal{C}} \left[ \ln P(c) + \sum_{i=1}^W \ln P(w_i \mid c) \right]$$

## 2. Laplace-Smoothed Likelihood
$$P(w \mid c) = \frac{C(c, w) + 1}{\sum_{w'} C(c, w') + |\mathcal{V}|}$$
